title: Korak 59

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
       
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),            
            (special_chars, fr'[{symbols}]')            
        ]
        # Check constraints
        count = 0
        for constraint, pattern in constraints:
            constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password))
    return password

# new_password = generate_password(8)
# print(new_password)
challengeFiles.seed:
import re
import secrets
import string


def generate_password(length, nums, special_chars, uppercase, lowercase):
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

    while True:
        password = ''
        # Generate password
        for _ in range(length):
            password += secrets.choice(all_characters)
       
        constraints = [
            (nums, r'\d'),
            (lowercase, r'[a-z]'),
            (uppercase, r'[A-Z]'),            
            (special_chars, fr'[{symbols}]')            
        ]
        # Check constraints
        count = 0
        for constraint, pattern in constraints:
            constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password))
    return password

tests.text: Trebalo bi da promeniš constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password)) u uslov if.
Treba da dodaš count kao deo svoje nove deklaracije if.

description:
Promeni matematički izraz unutar svog kruga for u deklaraciju if. Koristi postojeći matematički izraz constraint <= len(re.findall(pattern, password)) kao uslov za if.

U novom dokumentu sa uslovima, dodajte vrednost count za 1.
